personal_info.name: Abdelrahman Ali
personal_info.title: Flutter Developer | Cross-Platform Mobile Applications
personal_info.about_me: A Flutter Developer with +1 years of experience building high-performance cross-platform mobile applications. Profi cient in state management, Firebase integration, and applying clean architecture principles. Committed to delivering intuitive user experiences and collaborating effectively to achieve project goals.

technical_skills: RESTful APIs, Firebase, Hive, Shared Preferences and SQLite

experience.title: Intern Flutter Developer
description_points: Developed a scalable E-commerce mobile application from scratch.
Applied Clean Architecture principles and utilized Cubit for efficient state management.
Integrated RESTful APIs for products, authentication, cart, and checkout features.

experience.title: Summer Trainee
description_points: Developed the Actors App within the Breakin Point team using Flutter, focusing on performance, MVVM architecture, and seamless user experience.

projects.name: Nada City
projects.short_description: A comprehensive real estate platform for buying, selling, and renting properties.
projects.description: A modern real estate app that allows users to explore properties for sale (Tamleek) and rent (Egar). The app provides property listings, favorites, chat between users and admin, and a complete profile system. Users can easily add their own properties, browse listings, save favorites, and request or order properties. The app also includes a notification system powered by a Node.js backend to send real-time updates and alerts. Designed with a clean UI and smooth experience for seamless property discovery and communication.
features: Real-time chat between users and Admin
technologies_used: Cubit (Bloc) – State management for reactive UI
Firebase – Firebase Messaging, Firestore DB, and storage
SharedPreferences – Local storage for user settings and preferences
Cloudinary – Image upload and management for real estate listings
Node.js – Backend for real-time notifications and updates

projects.name: Cartsy
projects.short_description: A cross-platform e-commerce app for buying and selling products.
projects.description: Cartsy is an E-Commerce application built with Flutter.It allows users to browse products, search, add them to the cart, place orders, and edit existing orders.
features: Add products to the shopping cart.
Supports RESTful API for fetching data.
Local storage with SQLite and Shared Preferences.
Integration with Firebase for authentication and storage.

projects.name: Toba
projects.short_description: Toba is an Islamic app built with Flutter that helps Muslims in their daily worship.
projects.description: Toba is an Islamic app built with Flutter that helps Muslims in their daily worship.It provides Quran reading, Azkar (remembrances), Tasbih counter, and Prayer times based on the user's location.
features: 📖 Holy Quran – Read the Quran with smooth navigation.
🤲 Azkar – Morning , evening Azkar and more to stay connected with Allah.
📿 Tasbih Counter – Digital tasbih for dhikr.
🕌 Prayer Times – Accurate prayer times based on location.
📍 Location-based services – Uses device GPS to calculate prayer times.
technologies_used: Shared Preferences – Local storage for user data
Geolocator – Fetch user location to calculate prayer times

projects.name: Cine Scope
projects.short_description: A actors news app that provides up-to-date information on actors.
projects.description: Actors News is a mobile app that allows users to explore actors and their profiles using a real-time API. The app includes secure authentication with Firebase, including signup, login, and forgot password functionality. Users can save their favorite actors, download actor images, and receive personalized content based on their preferences. Designed with a clean UI and smooth transitions, the app delivers a seamless experience for discovering and keeping up with actors.
features: Actor profiles fetched from an API
Personalized content based on user preferences
Clean UI and smooth user experience

projects.name: Responsive Dashboard
projects.short_description: A Flutter project that demonstrates a responsive dashboard supporting Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile layouts.
projects.description: A Flutter project that demonstrates a responsive dashboard supporting Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile layouts.The UI adapts automatically based on screen size, providing a clean and consistent user experience across all devices.
features: Supports Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile layouts
